local_evidence_readback.finding: Maritime candidates are Artemis Technologies, Belfast Harbour, Harland & Wolff / Navantia UK Belfast, and the NI Green Seas / Belfast Maritime Consortium route. The file explicitly states all targets are candidates, not confirmed partners.
Current gate requires named maritime lead partner, vessel/infrastructure asset, site, safety/permit basis, deployment/trial plan and partner budget before portal draft or submission.
Manifest controls state that no partner invitation was sent and no vessel, port, shipyard, infrastructure, permit, insurance, budget, or partner relationship was claimed without evidence.

route_action.reason: No confirmed partner, asset, safety/permit, trial/deployment plan, or partner budget evidence was found.

next_actions: Use the existing maritime outreach template only after an exact target recipient and payload are action-time approved.
If any partner response is obtained, record it as source evidence before changing any maritime route to draft-ready or submit-ready.
Do not open CMDC7 or ZEVI IFS drafts without named maritime lead, asset/site, safety/permit, trial/deployment plan, and budget evidence.
